description:
Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app, evaluate the drug-drug interaction between the breast cancer drug 'Tamoxifen' and the antidepressant 'Fluoxetine'. Create a report at '/sdcard/interaction_report.txt' documenting the interaction color and the clinical mechanism or recommendation using the following format:

Cancer Drug: Tamoxifen
Co-medication: Fluoxetine
Interaction Color: [red/orange/yellow/green/grey]
Clinical Detail: [Summarize the mechanism or recommendation from the app]
